_meta.hint: repeat quality 67<80; clean sets 2/3 (7 sents, no Q, no threat) — one R1 set was unclean. These 2 sets each have exactly 7 sentences, zero question marks, zero punitive threats, last sentence longest.

sentences.sentence: First, measure the flour and sugar.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (flour, sugar); clear word-final consonants

sentences.sentence: Next, soften the butter in a bowl.
Then beat the eggs into the soft butter.
Stir the chocolate chips through the thick dough.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (chips, thick); reduced function words (through the)

sentences.sentence: Spoon small portions onto the lined baking tray.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables (portions); compound noun stress (baking tray)

sentences.sentence: Once the oven is hot, slide the tray onto the middle rack.
sentences.phonetic_focus: conditional intonation pattern; linking across clause boundary (oven_is)

sentences.sentence: When the edges turn golden brown, take the cookies out and let them cool.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing across a long sentence; reduced function words (let them)

sentences.sentence: Resume templates are available at the front desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (front desk); reduced syllables (available)

sentences.sentence: Sample cover letters are posted here.
Advisors can review your application materials each week.
Practice interviews are recorded for your later review.
sentences.phonetic_focus: passive linking (are_recorded); reduced function words (for your)

sentences.sentence: The job board is updated every Monday morning.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (job board); reduced syllables (updated, Monday)

sentences.sentence: Walk-in hours run from noon until four on weekdays.
If you are not sure where to begin, check the schedule on the bulletin board near the door.
sentences.phonetic_focus: conditional intonation; stress-timing across a long sentence; linking (check_the)
